scripts.name: api:artifacts
scripts.rawCommand: pnpm run openapi:edge-functions && pnpm run postman:collection

scripts.name: ci:local
scripts.rawCommand: pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run check:edge-functions:bundling:full && pnpm run openapi:edge-functions:check && pnpm run postman:collection:check && pnpm run docs:check-links && pnpm run docs:gen:check && pnpm run project:catalog:check && pnpm run type:check && pnpm run test:unit && cross-env VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://test.supabase.co VITE_SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=test-anon-key-for-ci pnpm run build

scripts.name: deploy:functions:payment-success
scripts.rawCommand: supabase functions deploy order-lookup && supabase functions deploy stripe-session-display && supabase functions deploy verify-payment

scripts.name: deploy:functions:stripe-return
scripts.rawCommand: pnpm run deploy:functions:payment-success && supabase functions deploy send-order-confirmation && supabase functions deploy stripe-webhook

scripts.name: deploy:pricing-snapshot-and-monitoring
scripts.rawCommand: supabase functions deploy stripe-webhook && supabase functions deploy verify-payment && supabase functions deploy reconcile-payment && supabase functions deploy send-order-confirmation && supabase functions deploy order-confirmation-lookup && supabase functions deploy get-order-by-token && supabase functions deploy monitor-payment-events

scripts.name: pr:enterprise:screenshots:capture
scripts.rawCommand: node scripts/run-e2e-ci.mjs "pnpm exec cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/pr_issue_evidence_spec.js"

scripts.name: test:pricing-snapshot
scripts.rawCommand: node scripts/assert-deno-v2.mjs && deno test --allow-env --allow-read=. --no-check --config supabase/functions/deno.json supabase/functions/_shared/pricing-snapshot_test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/pricing_snapshot_golden_test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/pricing_snapshot_extended_test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/persist-pricing-snapshot_test.ts supabase/functions/_shared/confirm-order_test.ts supabase/functions/stripe-webhook/lib/pricing-snapshot_test.ts supabase/functions/send-order-confirmation/_lib/email-pricing-from-db_test.ts && vitest run src/lib/checkout/pricingSnapshot.test.ts

scripts.name: type:check
scripts.rawCommand: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc --noEmit -p cypress/tsconfig.json

scripts.name: validate
scripts.rawCommand: pnpm run lint && pnpm run lint:e2e-port && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run type:check && pnpm run check:edge-functions:bundling && pnpm run test -- --run

scripts.name: verify:create-admin-user
scripts.rawCommand: pnpm run deno:check:create-admin-user && pnpm run deno:lint:create-admin-user && pnpm run test:create-admin-user

scripts.name: verify:create-payment
scripts.rawCommand: pnpm run deno:check:create-payment && pnpm run deno:lint:create-payment && deno test supabase/functions/create-payment/ --config supabase/functions/deno.json --allow-env

docs.title: Runbook production — checkout, webhook Stripe, e-mail (Brevo), facture
Data typing layers (SSOT → domain → boundaries → UI)
DENO_CERT — fournir et valider le bundle CA corporate
GitHub Actions — inventory, branch coverage, KPIs, and runbook
ci: workflows, smoke probe parity, and GITHUB-ACTIONS runbook
chore(lint): align eslint config with stricter posture on admin/UI surfaces
docs: rules registry, business logic, tech map, and agent runbooks
test(e2e): smoke probe port alignment and internal links spec
supabase: create-payment schema, confirm-order tests, generate-invoice hardening
types: edge invoke contracts, domain modules, Typedoc pipeline
chore(scripts): audit metrics, doc link check, gen-docs, proxy/CA helpers
perf/seo: OptimizedImage, Hero webp set, sitemap, llms.txt, index metadata
refactor(checkout): split useCheckoutPage, SPA import policy, CLIENT_VS_SERVER rules
feat(platform): pnpm rebaseline, CI/CD hardening, checkout architecture, and rules governance
